title: Angel & Seed Deal
description: Early-stage funding round announcement including angel, pre-seed, seed, convertible note, and SAFE deals.

company_name.description: Name of the company that raised funding. Commonly found in: AngelList, Crunchbase, press release.

company_domain.description: Website domain of the company. Commonly found in: company website, Crunchbase.

founder_names.description: Names of the company founders. Commonly found in: press release, AngelList, LinkedIn.

round_type.description: Type of funding round. Commonly found in: Crunchbase, press release, AngelList.

amount_usd.description: Amount raised in USD. Commonly found in: press release, Crunchbase, SEC Form D.

announced_date.description: Date the deal was announced. Commonly found in: press release date, Crunchbase, AngelList.

lead_investor_name.description: Name of the lead investor. Commonly found in: press release, Crunchbase, AngelList.

lead_investor_type.description: Type of lead investor. Commonly found in: press release, Crunchbase.

co_investors.description: List of co-investors in the round. Commonly found in: press release, Crunchbase, AngelList.

valuation_cap_usd.description: Valuation cap for convertible note or SAFE in USD. Commonly found in: SEC Form D, press release.

discount_pct.description: Discount percentage for convertible instruments. Commonly found in: SEC Form D, deal terms.

accelerator_name.description: Name of the accelerator program if applicable. Commonly found in: accelerator website, press release.

accelerator_batch.description: Accelerator batch or cohort identifier. Commonly found in: accelerator website, announcement.

company_description.description: Brief description of what the company does. Commonly found in: press release, Crunchbase, company website.

company_industry.description: Industry vertical of the company. Commonly found in: Crunchbase, AngelList, press release.

use_of_funds.description: Stated use of the raised funds. Commonly found in: press release, company blog.

source_type.description: Type of source where this deal was found. Commonly found in: scraper metadata.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
